verdict: Dermatologically sound formulation with dual molecular weight hyaluronic acid for layered hydration benefits. Clean ingredient profile makes it suitable for sensitive skin but lacks anti-aging actives beyond hydration.

_research.name: La Roche-Posay Hyalu B5 Pure Hyaluronic Acid Serum
_research.con: Limited anti-aging benefits beyond hydration; better suited for hydration-focused routines.
